full_text:
Wan Qian 萬潛
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wan Qian (萬潛). Accompanied Bao Xin when he welcomed Cao Cao into Yan. Urged Cao Cao to become Duke of Wei. Wan Qian was affiliated with Bao Xin and the Wei Kingdom.
